prompt.goal: Tutor creates first profile and edits basic fields. IsVerified=false on create. MyProfile dashboard; navbar link for Tutor role.
prompt.hardRules: - NO subjects multi-select (T6), video (T5), certs (T7), availability (T8), demo (T9) - [Authorize(Roles="Tutor")] on tutor actions - One profile per user (UserId unique) - Offline/Both requires Address
prompt.scope: - TutorProfileController: Create, Edit, MyProfile - TutorProfileFormViewModel - Views Create, Edit, MyProfile (+ partial form optional) - Layout link Hồ sơ gia sư
